title: PartyOptionTerminationCurrency
description: Specifies mechanism for Termination currency to be selected by the Non-defaulting Party/party which is not the Affected Party.

bothAffectedTermCurrencyOption.description: Specifies termination currency where there are two Affected Parties and they cannot agree on the termination currency.

terminationCurrencySpecifiedCondition.description: Specifies alternative conditions for selection of the termination currency.

terminationCurrencyCondition.description: Specifies the enumerated conditions for selection of the termination currency.
